title: Bad Moon Rising
why_this_song: Bad Moon Rising by Creedence Clearwater Revival (1969) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I see the bad moon a-rising"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Well it's bound to take your life"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Don't go around tonight"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Don't go around tonight"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Well it's bound to take your life"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Well it's bound to take your life
There's a bad moon on the rise.

There's a bad moon on the rise, all right.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "moon" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "moon" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "well" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "well" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I see the bad moon a-rising
Hope you are quite prepared to die

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I see trouble on the way
I hear the voice of rage and ruin
Looks like we're in for nasty weather

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Bad Moon Rising" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Bad Moon Rising" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Bad Moon Rising" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Bad Moon Rising", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Bad Moon Rising" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Bad Moon Rising" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
